name: Lumina — Glass New Tab
description: A cinematic glassmorphism new tab with persistent video/image backgrounds, clock, and search.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; media-src 'self' blob:; img-src 'self' blob: data:
